_about: Declarative arm matrix for the public-cut run, consumed by repro/run_arms.py. Two classes: REGISTERED = the five published study streams (the roster-structure comparison backing Zenodo 10.5281/zenodo.21270268, models exactly as role_binds.json records them); EXPLORATORY = unregistered post-study cells (newer-model single, CoT, OpenBio, per-flag Composo) that must never be quoted as study results. run_arms REUSES repro/setup_streams.setup_workspace (identical floor + corpus, $0) and applies per-role binds via POST /v1/roles/bind. ADDITIVE: the deposited 5-stream scripts are untouched. Every arm uses a UNIQUE role name (never the deposited single_generalist/ens_*/cs_*/cm_*/scalar_reward_baseline), so process-global per-role binds cannot re-point the deposited study. Lens tokens FULL/RISK/POLICY/FAITH resolve to setup_streams' study lens sets; prompt=specialist means per-role SPECIALIST_PROMPTS (risk/policy/faith) keyed off the role suffix. Plan: docs/reproduction/RUN_PLAN_PUBLIC_CUT.md.
cot_suffix: Think step by step before deciding, and commit to nothing until the analysis is complete. First, list each clinical claim the note makes. For each claim, quote the exact transcript or record text that supports it, or state that no support exists. For each candidate flag, restate the flag definition and check it against that evidence, including an explicit comparison of how specific the note's wording is versus how specific the source's wording is. Only after finishing this analysis choose your decision, findings, and reason.

prompts.generalist: You are a single generalist clinical-documentation reviewer. Review the note against the transcript across ALL defect lenses you are given: fabrication, unsupported or contradicted assertions, value mismatches, omissions and erasures (history, dissent, intent), misattribution, escalation misses, upcoding, inconsistency, and style. Raise every code the evidence supports.
prompts.ensemble_member: You are one reviewer in a multi-model ensemble; each ensemble member receives this SAME instruction. Review the note against the transcript across ALL defect lenses you are given: fabrication, unsupported or contradicted assertions, value mismatches, omissions and erasures (history, dissent, intent), misattribution, escalation misses, upcoding, inconsistency, and style. Raise every code the evidence supports.
prompts.reward_holistic: You are a holistic quality reviewer scoring the note against the transcript. Assess overall faithfulness, completeness, and safety of the documentation.
prompts.specialist: __SENTINEL__ per-role prompts resolved from setup_streams.SPECIALIST_PROMPTS by role suffix (risk/policy/faith); run_arms sends prompt=None so setup_workspace applies them.

arms._role_note: ensmix_* (NOT the deposited ens_*), to avoid the process-global per-role bind collision.

arms._note: Specialist trio (risk/policy/faith lenses, per-role prompts), all on ONE provider/model (azure gpt-4.1). Role-specialization held-model-constant.
Specialist trio with MIXED providers/models: role-specialization + model diversity.

The reward-model baseline: the shipped provider:composo RewardModelLM (holistic score -> verdict, findings empty). This is the study's scalar-reward baseline vendor, runnable via a Composo key. Distinct from arm-composo-judge (a per-flag judge, blocked).
EXPLORATORY (unregistered): single generalist on a newer frontier model than the registered arm-single. Do not quote as study results.

binds.note: Azure deployment name; point at a dated frontier snapshot.

arms._note: EXPLORATORY: arm-single-frontier-plain + the cot_suffix. CoT is a control-confirmed dead lever; kept for completeness.
EXPLORATORY: medically fine-tuned judge (OpenBioLLM-70B). K=1 forced by Featherless' 4-unit concurrency cap.

arms.blocked_reason: Composo as a per-flag JUDGE surface needs the Stage 4.5 adapter (docs/reproduction/RUN_PLAN_PUBLIC_CUT.md). The shipped provider:composo (reward_lm.py) is a single-criterion reward wire with empty findings, i.e. the reward baseline (see arm-scalar-reward), not a per-flag voter. run_arms.py SKIPS blocked arms. Flip status to ready once the adapter's acceptance test is green.
